task_completion.description: A terminal window is open and shows command activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal/console window is visible on screen with text output

task_completion.description: Database writer channel created via REST API
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows curl POST to /api/channels with XML body containing DatabaseDispatcher, and a channel ID returned

task_completion.description: Channel has Database Writer destination with JDBC connection
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows channel XML with DatabaseDispatcherProperties, JDBC URL, or INSERT INTO patient_records
Terminal shows psql query confirming patient_records table exists or CREATE TABLE command
Terminal shows deployment command executed or dashboard shows channel in STARTED state

task_completion.description: Patient records were inserted into the database
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows psql SELECT from patient_records with data rows, or message processing with INSERT evidence

integrity.visual_evidence: Channel XML or API response shows port 6663 configured

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a channel that writes HL7 patient data to PostgreSQL. Success indicators: (1) channel created with DatabaseDispatcherProperties in XML, (2) JDBC connection to nextgen-postgres, (3) patient_records table created, (4) channel deployed on port 6663, (5) records visible in database after message processing.
